title: 240 Sheets Red MG Tissue Paper 20x30 Inches, Acid Free Craft Art
features: Size - approx 50cm x 75cm / 20" x 30" All quantities are approx.
Material - Full color tissue paper, 17GSM. Slight Shine on one side.
Usage - Great for use when storing items, decorative packaging also used arts and craft projects
Note: Color may vary slightly due to the color setting of each individual monitor.
description: Our colourful premium soft tissue paper is a great material to be used for storing items, decorating gifts and packages and for textured art and craft projects. Companies that often use tissue paper are jewellers, gift and flower businesses. Tissue paper can be used as a colourful alternative to bubble wrap. To use tissue paper as packaging, just wrap your item and place it inside the boxes or bag. Tissue paper sizes available in our store. 20x30 inches = 508x762 MM Our tissue paper is available in is Black, Baby Blue, Blue Dark, Brown, Burgundy, Cerise, Cream, Gold, Green Dark, Green, Lime, Lilac, Orange, Peach, Pink, Purple, Red, Silver, Turquoise, White and Yellow tissue paper sizes available in our store.

specifications_table.Recommended Uses For Product: Decorative wrapping, Craft projects, Storage, Cushioning
